technical_replicate: the expression of circPLCE1 and linear PLCE1 was measured by qRT-PCR
experimental_design: normal vs CRC cell lines comparison
We used high throughput RNA sequencing to identify differentially expressed circular RNAs (circRNAs) between normal human intestinal epithelial cell lines and CRC cell lines.
factor_value: cell lines (normal: HIEC-6, NCM460; CRC: HCT8, HCT116, DLD1)
We performed total RNA sequencing using both normal human intestinal epithelial cell lines (HIEC-6 and NCM460) and CRC cell lines (HCT8, HCT116 and DLD1).
